debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn✝ : 2 ≤ n
points : Fin n → EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2) × EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)
hpoints : ∀ (i : Fin n), (points i).1 ≠ (points i).2
interAlong : Fin n → Fin (n - 1) ↪o ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)
interBtw : (i : Fin n) → { j // i ≠ j } ≃ Fin (n - 1)
lineMap_eq_iff :
  ∀ (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) (ri rj : ↑(Set.Ioo 0 1)),
    (lineMap (points i).1 (points i).2) ↑ri = (lineMap (points j).1 (points j).2) ↑rj ↔
      ri = (interAlong i) ((interBtw i) ⟨j, hij⟩) ∧ rj = (interAlong j) ((interBtw j) ⟨i, ⋯⟩)
clap : Bool → Fin (n - 1) → Fin (n - 1)
clap_def : ∀ (b : Bool), clap b = if b = true then Fin.rev else _root_.id
hn : Odd n
⊢ ∃ F,
    ∀ (f g : Fin n),
      f ≠ g →
        (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1 ∧
          ∀ (t : Fin (n - 1)),
            (lineMap (points (F f).1).1 (points (F f).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F f).1) (clap (F f).2 t)) ≠
              (lineMap (points (F g).1).1 (points (F g).1).2) ↑((interAlong (F g).1) (clap (F g).2 t))

have h₁ : ∃ F : Fin n → Fin n × Bool, ∀ f g (hfg : f ≠ g), (F f).1 ≠ (F g).1 ∧ ∀ t : Fin (n - 1 : ℕ), lineMap (points (F f).1).1 (points (F f).1).2 (interAlong (F f).1 (clap (F f).2 t)).1 ≠ lineMap (points (F g).1).1 (points (F g).1).2 (interAlong (F g).1 (clap (F g).2 t)).1 := by
    -- We use a simple construction where each frog is assigned to a unique segment and always moves forward.
    -- This construction ensures that the frogs never occupy the same intersection point at the same time.
    use fun i => ⟨i, true⟩
    intro f g hfg
    have h₂ : (⟨f, true⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1 ≠ (⟨g, true⟩ : Fin n × Bool).1 := by
      intro h
      simp_all [Fin.ext_iff]
    constructor
    · exact h₂
    · intro t
      -- For each time t, we need to ensure that the frogs are at different points.
      -- Since they are on different segments and move at the same rate, they cannot collide.
      have h₃ : lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 ≠ lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := by
        by_contra h
        -- If they were equal, it would contradict the given intersection conditions.
        have h₄ : lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 = lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := h
        have h₅ : (interAlong f (clap true t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = interAlong f (clap true t) := rfl
        have h₆ : (interAlong g (clap true t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = interAlong g (clap true t) := rfl
        have h₇ : lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 = lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := h₄
        have h₈ : (f : Fin n) ≠ (g : Fin n) := by
          intro h₉
          apply hfg
          simp_all
        have h₉ : ∀ ri rj : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1, lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 ri.1 = lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 rj.1 ↔ ri = interAlong f (interBtw f ⟨g, h₈⟩) ∧ rj = interAlong g (interBtw g ⟨f, h₈.symm⟩) := by
          intro ri rj
          exact lineMap_eq_iff f g h₈ ri rj
        have h₁₀ := h₉ (interAlong f (clap true t)) (interAlong g (clap true t))
        have h₁₁ : lineMap (points f).1 (points f).2 (interAlong f (clap true t)).1 = lineMap (points g).1 (points g).2 (interAlong g (clap true t)).1 := h₄
        have h₁₂ : (interAlong f (clap true t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = interAlong f (clap true t) := rfl
        have h₁₃ : (interAlong g (clap true t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = interAlong g (clap true t) := rfl
        have h₁₄ : (interAlong f (clap true t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = interAlong f (clap true t) := rfl
        have h₁₅ : (interAlong g (clap true t) : Set.Ioo (0 : ℝ) 1) = interAlong g (clap true t) := rfl
        simp_all [h₈]
        <;>
        (try contradiction) <;>
        (try simp_all [interBtw, interAlong, clap, clap_def, Fin.ext_iff]) <;>
        (try norm_num) <;>
        (try linarith) <;>
        (try aesop)
      exact h₃
  exact h₁
